LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERS $36,000.00 IN RELOCATION PAYMENTS ($3,000.00 X 12). MR. GRIM TO PROVIDE NAMES OF 12 PEOPLE IN BUILDING, AND TO NOTIFY THEM THAT THEY WILL RECEIVE RELOCATION PAYMENTS OF $3,000.00 EACH IF THEY LEAVE IN 20 DAYS. IF DO NOT LEAVE IN 20 DAYS, NO RELOCATION PAYMENT. MR. CHAU ORDERED TO MAKE PAYMENT WHEN THEY LEAVE THE BUILDING. 20 DAYS RUNS FROM ENTRY OF ORDER. (302/AJR/PB) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. Pltf'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLTF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Michael S. Weiss, & Neli N. Palma, Deputy City Attys 554-3824 for pltfs & moving parties; LeRue J. Grim, Esq. 621-8071 for deft & opposing party James H. Chau; Philip O'Brien, Esq. 865-2099 for all tenants; Teresa R. Poblete, Spanish Interpreter 256-9389 x3025 (sworn).
RULING: Agreement/settlement made on the record. All terms & conditions stated on the record at length. All 13 tenants understand and agree to terms. Mr. Chau and Mr. Grim concur that this agreement covers only this motion for preliminary injunction. Mr. Grim to prepare order. (Session concluded 7:06pm.) (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Plaintiffs Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLTF'S OSC RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Margarita Gutierrez (sworn & examined), & Michael Weiss, Deputy City Attys 554-3824 for pltfs & moving parties; LeRue J. Grim, Esq. 621-8071 for deft & opposing party James H. Chau.
RULING: Argued and the Court orders $36,000.00 in relocation payments ($3,000.00 x 12). Mr. Grim to provide names of 12 people in building, and to notify them that they will receive relocation payments of $3,000.00 each if they leave in 20 days. If do not leave in 20 days, no relocation payment. Mr. Chau ordered to make payment when they leave the building. 20 days runs from entry of order. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Plaintiffs Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-01-2002 Continued To Nov-08-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLTF'S OSC RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Michael Weiss, Deputy City Atty 554-3824 pltfs & moving parties; LeRue J. Grim, Esq. 621-8071 for deft & opposing party James H. Chau.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 11/08/02 at 10:30am. Mr. Grim to file declaration re status. Deft to turnover books to pltf. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Leland Batara, CSR#3759

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER
Off Calendar Oct-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION:
APPEAR: Michael S. Weiss, Deputy City Atty 554-3824 for pltfs & moving parties; LeRue James Grim, Esq. 621-8071 for deft & opposing party James Chau.
RULING: Argued and the Court orders relocation to be paid by landlord and continues the matter to 11/01/02 re setting the amount of relocation costs. Deft to file supplemental opposition by 10/29; reply, if any, due by noon on 10/31. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
